description: A hollow, bottle-shaped vase oriented upright along the Z-axis, generated by revolving a straight-line outer profile and shelling it with a 2mm wall thickness, leaving the top open.
notes: Create the outer wire profile in the XZ plane with the specified coordinate points: (0,0) to (25,0) to (25,5) to (28,25) to (22,45) to (10,55) to (10,65) to (0,65) and close it, or revolve the outer profile line and shell it. Ensure the shell operation removes the top face at Z=65 with a thickness of 2mm pointing inwards. The final part must be centered at (0,0) in X and Y.
